description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a single stage called validate. Add a job named "prepare done" that runs in the validate stage and simply extends the .common:stage-done template (no custom script). Add a second job named "validate" that also runs in the validate stage, extends the .common:docker-in-docker template (so it uses a Docker image with Docker‑in‑Docker service), and applies the .rules:merge-requests rule to run only on merge‑request pipelines. In its before_script it runs "apk add -U make bash", and its script executes the exact command "make build validate". No caches, artifacts, or additional variables are defined.
